extraction.one_line_summary: ALMEIDA João attacked with Quintana and Iguita 2.7km to go, won photo finish on gravel summit after Quintana overcautiously cornered the descent.
tactical_patterns: UAE placed Soler in break after missing stage 3, insurance tactic paid off when O'Connor cracked late.
INEOS set grinding pace with Sivakov/Krywkowski/Porte despite no GC contender, likely targeting stage for Carapaz not overall.
Quintana saved teammates' energy never pulling in chase groups, preserving firepower for final 3km attack.
Gravel summit finish at top rewarded descending courage; Quintana's caution on loose surface cost stage win.

rider_signals.O'CONNOR Ben: negative: lost leader's jersey after team burned chasing break, couldn't respond when Almeida/Quintana/Iguita went at 2.7km
rider_signals.ALMEIDA João: positive: UAE's secondary GC option outsprinted two Colombians on gravel after summit attack, takes white jersey
rider_signals.QUINTANA Nacho: positive: took GC lead on countback same time as Almeida, conserved team energy by never pulling in groups
rider_signals.CARAPAZ Richard: neutral: INEOS set pace for his attack but Almeida/Quintana/Iguita group proved stronger on final climb
rider_signals.VALVERDE Alejandro: negative: dropped early indicating illness or off-form, unable to maintain even moderate climbing pace
rider_signals.IGUITA Santiago: positive: Colombian champion matched every late move including Carapaz and final 2.7km selection
